name: l3-switch-svi
description: Inter-VLAN routing on a Layer 3 switch using SVIs. The switch (ip routing enabled) holds a switched virtual interface per VLAN as the gateway and routes between them internally, with no external router and no trunk hairpin. Two host routers (one per VLAN) prove cross-VLAN connectivity. Companion lab for the Layer 3 switch inter-VLAN routing article.
